{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041127EB0917D8D058538B4890"}"},"total":79339},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7296671226415121190","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不管别人怎么看，我就觉得这本小说写得挺好的，不狗血不废话，不像那种无脑的热血爽文不管主角惹到背后势力大的还是比主角强的也好，都是直接怼上去到最后都是主角活下来一点逻辑都没有，像这本小说的话遇到比主角强的他能不招惹就绝对不招惹，要不就是交好要不就是忍让，剧情挺合理的，加油我看好这本小说[奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698889650,"group_id":"7180279419959774247","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"从一个合格的读者开始","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx4xzF+ZFespMxWRFIhjEDg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/263e2c9c28314611aaf3e7cbec5dcd74~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704323&x-signature=13XCjlORYvqEMJymFoZtZG%2BO9%2Bc%3D","user_id":"470243634325496","user_name":"yq一个合格的读者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"470243634325496","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1716290782,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7180279419959774247","book_info":{"abstract":"末世+重生+爆囤物资+苟+无限空间+黑化复仇不圣母
　　全球进入冰河时代，寒冰末世来临，星球95%的人类全部丧生！
　　上一世，张奕因为心地善良，结果被自己帮助过的人杀死了。
　　重生回到寒冰末世前一个月，张奕觉醒空间异能，开始疯狂的囤积物资！
　　缺少物资？他直接掏空一座超级商场价值百亿的仓库！
　　住的不舒服？他打造了一座堪比末日堡垒的超级安全屋！
　　末日来临，别人都冻成狗，为了一口吃的可以舍弃一切。
　　而张奕却过的比末世之前还要自在。
　　白莲花：张奕，只要你让我进入你的房子，我就答应做你女朋友。
　　富二代：张奕，我愿意用我所有的钱，换你们家的一顿饭！
　　禽兽邻居们：张奕，你应该和我们一起分享物资，不应该那么自私！
　　……
　　看着这些前世背叛过自己的人们，张奕躺在安全屋里，舒舒服服的过着世外桃源一般的生活。
　　张奕：你们死不死的跟我有什么关系啊？我的东西喂狗也不给你们！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ea5ee153629934c95a3745f3985e464c","author":"记忆的海","author_id":"","book_id":"7180279419959774247","book_name":"全球冰封：我打造了末日安全屋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"50万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7181453438667096588","read_count":"499699","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"6250153"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"2679","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,求生,囤物资,末日求生,打脸,天灾,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/273cb74a34d5926ce63e
